---
title: "Assignment 1"
> library(dslabs)
> data("polls_us_election_2016")
> #my info
> my_first <- "Aziz"
> my_birth_year <- 1999
> #integer definition
> k <- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %% 15 + 8
> force(results_us_election_2016)
                  state electoral_votes  clinton     trump  johnson     stein   mcmullin     others
1            California              55 61.72640 31.617107 3.374092 1.9649200  0.2792070 1.03827531
2                 Texas              38 43.23526 52.234686 3.160719 0.7978169  0.4723485 0.09917244
3               Florida              29 47.82332 49.021941 2.197900 0.6836384  0.0000000 0.27320481
4              New York              29 59.00604 36.515588 2.287108 1.3978457  0.1343400 0.65907285
5              Illinois              20 55.82537 38.761753 3.785765 1.3872131  0.2105149 0.02938720
6          Pennsylvania              20 47.46495 48.183336 2.379621 0.8100102  0.1049716 1.05711187
7                  Ohio              18 43.55808 51.687651 3.174719 0.8418286  0.2287643 0.50896145
8               Georgia              16 45.63998 50.771326 3.045302 0.1865006  0.3163511 0.04053727
9              Michigan              16 47.27453 47.497564 3.586702 1.0723058  0.1703796 0.39851778
10       North Carolina              15 46.17287 49.828095 2.744369 0.2552955  0.0000000 0.99937489
11           New Jersey              14 55.45308 41.350387 1.870835 0.9750013  0.0000000 0.35069279
12             Virginia              13 49.72789 44.406697 2.968255 0.6936150  1.3565623 0.84697931
13           Washington              12 52.53868 36.832680 4.850108 1.7611295  0.0000000 4.01740237
14              Arizona              11 44.58042 48.083145 4.082188 1.3185997  0.6699155 1.26573288
15              Indiana              11 37.77484 56.940033 4.899271 0.2866954  0.0000000 0.09916057
16        Massachusetts              11 60.00506 32.808358 4.150860 1.4333937  0.0817733 1.52055039
17            Tennessee              11 34.71633 60.722034 2.806868 0.6376726  0.4781049 0.63898834
18             Maryland              10 60.32574 33.909305 2.862001 1.2923134  0.3462228 1.26441427
19            Minnesota              10 46.44492 44.924788 3.836305 1.2559371  1.8023555 1.73569595
20             Missouri              10 38.13523 56.772348 3.466454 0.9050400  0.2517620 0.46916530
21            Wisconsin              10 46.45384 47.218185 3.584295 1.0440334  0.3983334 1.30131210
22              Alabama               9 34.35795 62.083092 2.094169 0.4422682  0.0000000 1.02252455
23             Colorado               9 48.15651 43.250977 5.183748 1.3825031  1.0400874 0.98617137
24       South Carolina               9 40.67342 54.939333 2.339675 0.6197733  0.9993215 0.42847762
25             Kentucky               8 32.68219 62.519639 2.793547 0.7230729  1.1839000 0.09765356
26            Louisiana               8 38.44957 58.088685 1.871730 0.6915120  0.4212353 0.47727192
27          Connecticut               7 54.56630 40.926914 2.959171 1.3885782  0.1281521 0.03088296
28             Oklahoma               7 28.93168 65.322865 5.745455 0.0000000  0.0000000 0.00000000
29               Oregon               7 50.07185 39.094035 4.708405 2.4984310  0.0000000 3.62727698
30             Arkansas               6 33.65190 60.571906 2.648769 0.8378174  1.1653206 1.12428317
31                 Iowa               6 41.74049 51.147327 3.779363 0.7329995  0.7896395 1.81018128
32               Kansas               6 36.05237 56.654582 4.677973 1.9846302  0.5504888 0.07995596
33          Mississippi               6 40.11479 57.941038 1.193609 0.3085111  0.0000000 0.44205309
34               Nevada               6 47.91782 45.500695 3.321885 0.0000000  0.0000000 3.25959561
35                 Utah               6 27.45870 45.538036 3.500703 0.8341656 21.5382304 1.13016271
36           New Mexico               5 48.25565 40.042514 9.337245 1.2374752  0.7296582 0.39746016
37        West Virginia               5 26.42608 68.498775 3.219941 1.1302828  0.1545303 0.57039037
38               Hawaii               4 62.22149 30.038677 3.719427 2.9694337  0.0000000 1.05097019
39                Idaho               4 27.49201 59.261432 4.104425 1.2308495  6.7331638 1.17811533
40        New Hampshire               4 46.82626 46.458667 4.135048 0.8727710  0.1429539 1.56429700
41         Rhode Island               4 54.40661 38.898057 3.177031 1.3401013  0.1111724 2.06703092
42               Alaska               3 36.55087 51.281512 5.877128 1.8000176  0.0000000 4.49047105
43             Delaware               3 53.08598 41.712745 3.325042 1.3751256  0.1590756 0.34203518
44 District of Columbia               3 90.86382  4.087474 1.576134 1.3679530  0.0000000 2.10461724
45              Montana               3 35.74577 56.168497 5.639579 1.6031476  0.4620364 0.38097384
46         North Dakota               3 27.22674 62.955628 6.224300 1.0976885  0.0000000 2.49564409
47         South Dakota               3 31.73743 61.530750 5.633719 0.0000000  0.0000000 1.09810237
48              Vermont               3 56.67779 30.269435 3.198685 2.1449406  0.2028140 7.50633992
49              Wyoming               3 21.87736 68.172633 5.193298 0.9830017  0.0000000 3.77371027
50                Maine               2 47.83020 44.869753 5.094749 1.9053999  0.2522973 0.04759823
51             Nebraska               2 33.69876 58.747351 4.613214 1.0394124  0.0000000 1.90126589
52           Maine CD-1               1 53.95850 39.151064 4.714845 1.9179416  0.2046514 0.05300143
53           Maine CD-2               1 40.97636 51.264515 5.520407 1.8915386  0.3055889 0.04159404
54        Nebraska CD-1               1 35.46228 56.183906 4.969861 1.1949200  0.0000000 2.18903394
55        Nebraska CD-2               1 44.92252 47.162644 4.540935 1.1474904  0.0000000 2.22641251
56        Nebraska CD-3               1 19.73359 73.912159 4.317324 0.7600089  0.0000000 1.27691852
> if (k %% 2 == 0) {
+     print(head(polls_us_election_2016, k))
+ } else {
+     print(tail(polls_us_election_2016, k))
+ }
        state  startdate    enddate                                                   pollster grade
1        U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-06                                   ABC News/Washington Post    A+
2        U.S. 2016-11-01 2016-11-07                                    Google Consumer Surveys     B
3        U.S. 2016-11-02 2016-11-06                                                      Ipsos    A-
4        U.S. 2016-11-04 2016-11-07                                                     YouGov     B
5        U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-06                                           Gravis Marketing    B-
6        U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-06 Fox News/Anderson Robbins Research/Shaw & Company Research     A
7        U.S. 2016-11-02 2016-11-06                                    CBS News/New York Times    A-
8        U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-05                               NBC News/Wall Street Journal    A-
9  New Mexico 2016-11-06 2016-11-06                                                   Zia Poll  <NA>
10       U.S. 2016-11-04 2016-11-07                                                   IBD/TIPP    A-
11       U.S. 2016-11-04 2016-11-06                                           Selzer & Company    A+
12       U.S. 2016-11-01 2016-11-04                                          Angus Reid Global    A-
13       U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-06                                        Monmouth University    A+
14   Virginia 2016-11-03 2016-11-04                                      Public Policy Polling    B+
15       U.S. 2016-11-01 2016-11-03                                             Marist College     A
16       Iowa 2016-11-01 2016-11-04                                           Selzer & Company    A+
   samplesize population rawpoll_clinton rawpoll_trump rawpoll_johnson rawpoll_mcmullin adjpoll_clinton
1        2220         lv           47.00         43.00            4.00               NA        45.20163
2       26574         lv           38.03         35.69            5.46               NA        43.34557
3        2195         lv           42.00         39.00            6.00               NA        42.02638
4        3677         lv           45.00         41.00            5.00               NA        45.65676
5       16639         rv           47.00         43.00            3.00               NA        46.84089
6        1295         lv           48.00         44.00            3.00               NA        49.02208
7        1426         lv           45.00         41.00            5.00               NA        45.11649
8        1282         lv           44.00         40.00            6.00               NA        43.58576
9        8439         lv           46.00         44.00            6.00               NA        44.82594
10       1107         lv           41.20         42.70            7.10               NA        42.92745
11        799         lv           44.00         41.00            4.00               NA        44.21714
12       1151         lv           48.00         44.00            6.00               NA        47.57171
13        748         lv           50.00         44.00            4.00               NA        48.86765
14       1238         lv           48.00         43.00            1.00               NA        47.43805
15        940         lv           44.00         43.00            6.00               NA        42.83406
16        800         lv           39.00         46.00            6.00               NA        39.37561
   adjpoll_trump adjpoll_johnson adjpoll_mcmullin
1       41.72430        4.626221               NA
2       41.21439        5.175792               NA
3       38.81620        6.844734               NA
4       40.92004        6.069454               NA
5       42.33184        3.726098               NA
6       43.95631        3.057876               NA
7       40.92722        4.341786               NA
8       40.77325        5.365788               NA
9       41.59978        7.870127               NA
10      42.23545        6.316175               NA
11      40.57082        4.068708               NA
12      43.68125        5.556625               NA
13      43.39600        4.838600               NA
14      42.32751        2.207659               NA
15      43.43819        4.780429               NA
16      45.66917        6.062713               NA
> #total number of NA values
> total_na <- sum(is.na(polls_us_election_2016))
> print(total_na)
[1] 11604
> na_per_column <- colSums(is.na(polls_us_election_2016))
> sorted_na <- sort(na_per_column, decreasing = TRUE)
> print(head(sorted_na, 8))
rawpoll_mcmullin adjpoll_mcmullin  rawpoll_johnson  adjpoll_johnson            grade       samplesize 
            4178             4178             1409             1409              429                1 
           state        startdate 
               0                0 
> #replacing NA values
> new_data <- polls_us_election_2016
> for(i in 1:ncol(new_data)) {
+ if(is.numeric(new_data[[i]])) {
+ fill_value_num <- my_birth_year + k
+ new_data[[i]][is.na(new_data[[i]])] <- fill_value_num
+ } else {
+ new_data[[i]] <- as.character(new_data[[i]])
+ fill_value_char <- paste0(my_first, "_", k)
+ new_data[[i]][is.na(new_data[[i]])] <- fill_value_char
+ } }
> if (k %% 2 == 0) { head(new_data, k) } else { tail(new_data, k) }
        state  startdate    enddate                                                   pollster   grade
1        U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-06                                   ABC News/Washington Post      A+
2        U.S. 2016-11-01 2016-11-07                                    Google Consumer Surveys       B
3        U.S. 2016-11-02 2016-11-06                                                      Ipsos      A-
4        U.S. 2016-11-04 2016-11-07                                                     YouGov       B
5        U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-06                                           Gravis Marketing      B-
6        U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-06 Fox News/Anderson Robbins Research/Shaw & Company Research       A
7        U.S. 2016-11-02 2016-11-06                                    CBS News/New York Times      A-
8        U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-05                               NBC News/Wall Street Journal      A-
9  New Mexico 2016-11-06 2016-11-06                                                   Zia Poll Aziz_16
10       U.S. 2016-11-04 2016-11-07                                                   IBD/TIPP      A-
11       U.S. 2016-11-04 2016-11-06                                           Selzer & Company      A+
12       U.S. 2016-11-01 2016-11-04                                          Angus Reid Global      A-
13       U.S. 2016-11-03 2016-11-06                                        Monmouth University      A+
14   Virginia 2016-11-03 2016-11-04                                      Public Policy Polling      B+
15       U.S. 2016-11-01 2016-11-03                                             Marist College       A
16       Iowa 2016-11-01 2016-11-04                                           Selzer & Company      A+
   samplesize population rawpoll_clinton rawpoll_trump rawpoll_johnson rawpoll_mcmullin adjpoll_clinton
1        2220         lv           47.00         43.00            4.00             2015        45.20163
2       26574         lv           38.03         35.69            5.46             2015        43.34557
3        2195         lv           42.00         39.00            6.00             2015        42.02638
4        3677         lv           45.00         41.00            5.00             2015        45.65676
5       16639         rv           47.00         43.00            3.00             2015        46.84089
6        1295         lv           48.00         44.00            3.00             2015        49.02208
7        1426         lv           45.00         41.00            5.00             2015        45.11649
8        1282         lv           44.00         40.00            6.00             2015        43.58576
9        8439         lv           46.00         44.00            6.00             2015        44.82594
10       1107         lv           41.20         42.70            7.10             2015        42.92745
11        799         lv           44.00         41.00            4.00             2015        44.21714
12       1151         lv           48.00         44.00            6.00             2015        47.57171
13        748         lv           50.00         44.00            4.00             2015        48.86765
14       1238         lv           48.00         43.00            1.00             2015        47.43805
15        940         lv           44.00         43.00            6.00             2015        42.83406
16        800         lv           39.00         46.00            6.00             2015        39.37561
   adjpoll_trump adjpoll_johnson adjpoll_mcmullin
1       41.72430        4.626221             2015
2       41.21439        5.175792             2015
3       38.81620        6.844734             2015
4       40.92004        6.069454             2015
5       42.33184        3.726098             2015
6       43.95631        3.057876             2015
7       40.92722        4.341786             2015
8       40.77325        5.365788             2015
9       41.59978        7.870127             2015
10      42.23545        6.316175             2015
11      40.57082        4.068708             2015
12      43.68125        5.556625             2015
13      43.39600        4.838600             2015
14      42.32751        2.207659             2015
15      43.43819        4.780429             2015
16      45.66917        6.062713             2015
> sum(is.na(new_data))
[1] 0
> anyNA(new_data)
[1] FALSE
**** I get a lot of help from AI, especially about writing end symbols like this "}" etc. and notifications of coding. I could not figure it out myself. And I am not sure if I need to upload the codes like this, sorry if I was wrong.
---

# Assignment 1

My first assignment has only the second part for now.

## (a)

## (b)
